title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DSV India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DSV India
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
